name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve Commander
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Run command '...'
2. With config '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Logs / Output

```
Paste any relevant log output, stack traces, or error messages.
```

## Environment

- Commander version: [e.g. 0.2.0]
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 22.x]
- LLM provider: [e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here, such as config files, task descriptions, or reproduction repository.
